multi_step: Solving an ideal op-amp circuit typically requires reading the circuit from the image and then applying circuit/op-amp constraints before computing Vout.
The question provides two input values (V1 and V2), which suggests combining multiple conditions/signals rather than a single direct lookup.

verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='400', so the final response format is precise and easy to check.
The problem statement specifies an ideal operational amplifier, which usually makes the result deterministic under a given circuit diagram.
asset_registry_record shows question_present=true, answer_present=true, and registry_passed=true, supporting reliable downstream verification.
